attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.MESSAGE_3B2_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.DELIVERY_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.HANDLING_UNIT_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.LEG1_TRACKING_NO_LPN, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.LEG2_TRACKING_NO_LPN, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.RTV_REASON_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ERROR_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF,
 (
 select MESSAGE_3B2_ID ,HANDLING_UNIT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF
 minus
 select MESSAGE_3B2_ID ,HANDLING_UNIT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHIPLPN_IB_IFACE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MESSAGE_3B2_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.MESSAGE_3B2_ID and ACM.HANDLING_UNIT_ID=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.HANDLING_UNIT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHPLPN_IB_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_SHIPLPN_IB_IFACE)
